expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs link-types to discover available link type names
expectations.evidence: Step 1 shows: 'jira.mjs link-types' to list available link types before creating any links.

expectations.text: Creates a 'blocks' link between PROJ-100 and PROJ-200
Creates a 'relates to' link between PROJ-100 and PROJ-50
expectations.evidence: Step 3 shows: 'jira.mjs link PROJ-100 PROJ-50 --type "relates to"'.

expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs link command for both operations
expectations.evidence: Both Steps 2 and 3 use 'jira.mjs link' command with appropriate arguments.
